name: Streusel Pound Cake
recipeInstructions: If using a 3-quart crockpot, place a 2 lb. coffee can in it. For larger crockpots (5-quart), use a 9-cup Bundt pan or a 2 lb. coffee can. Mix the pound cake batter according to package instructions. Pour half of the batter into the prepared coffee can, greased and floured. Combine the streusel ingredients and sprinkle over the batter. Add the remaining batter and top with the rest of the streusel. Cover the pan or can tightly with 8 paper towels. Place in the crockpot and cook on HIGH for 3 to 4 hours. If using a Bundt pan, bake for 2 to 3 hours.
